name: the-power-worshippers
description: Katherine Stewart's The Power Worshippers: Inside the Dangerous Rise of Religious Nationalism — an investigative journalism toolkit exposing the organized Christian nationalist movement: dominionist theology (Seven Mountains Mandate), Project Blitz state-level strategy, court takeover, school board battles, and the alliance with the Trump administration.
useCase: Understand the organized Christian nationalist movement — its theology, strategy, legal tactics, and how it seeks to transform American government into a Christian theocracy.
knownRisks: The book is from 2019 — some specific details may be dated (post-Trump presidency)
The author is clearly opposed to the movement she describes — not a neutral account
Distinguishing between faith and political movement is essential — the book critiques a political movement, not Christianity itself
